message:
fix(ci): clone rich_rust dependency and add ci profile for tarpaulin

Multiple fixes for CI failures:

1. Clone rich_rust dependency in all CI jobs - the Cargo.toml
   references it via relative path ../rich_rust

2. Fix rich_rust path from absolute /dp/rich_rust to relative
   ../rich_rust for portability

3. Add [profile.ci] to Cargo.toml - tarpaulin was failing with
   "profile ci is not defined" when using --profile ci flag

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Clone rich_rust dependency
+        run: |
+          cd ..
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git rich_rust || true
+
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
@@ -54,6 +59,11 @@ jobs:

+      - name: Clone rich_rust dependency

+
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:

@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ anyhow = "1.0"
 # Terminal output
 indicatif = "0.17"
 console = "0.15"
-rich_rust = { path = "/dp/rich_rust", features = ["json"] }
+rich_rust = { path = "../rich_rust", features = ["json"] }
 
 # Logging
 tracing = "0.1"
@@ -83,6 +83,11 @@ codegen-units = 1
 panic = "abort"
 strip = true
 
+# CI profile for coverage testing (inherits from dev)
+[profile.ci]
+inherits = "dev"
+debug = true
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 # Testing utilities
 tempfile = "3.15"
